'''LIN-V8M''' was an armored [[LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer/Legends|LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Originally created to set charges inside ore and [[Spice/Legends|spice]] mines, it had been converted for military use.<ref name="CCG" /> LIN-V8M was present on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] and was destroyed along with that battle station during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="SWE" /> A similar droid, designated [[LIN-V8K/Legends|LIN-V8K]] was in the same [[Sandcrawler]] as [[C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2]].
